lessons.title: The Art of Information Gathering 🕵️
lessons.description: Understand the critical first phase of any attack: knowing your target.

lessons.title: OSINT: Open Source Intelligence 🌍
lessons.description: Harness search engines, social media, and public data to profile a target.

lessons.title: DNS Interrogation & Subdomain Discovery 📖
lessons.description: Extract network infrastructure details from the Domain Name System.

lessons.title: Network & WHOIS Footprinting 🌐
lessons.description: Map IP ranges, ASNs, and find the owners behind a domain.

lessons.title: Website & Technology Fingerprinting 🧬
lessons.description: Identify web servers, CMS platforms, and hidden directories.

lessons.title: Email & Document Metadata Mining 📎
lessons.description: Extract usernames, software versions, and geolocation from files.
